creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
fetch not understand URL for patch


=> Attempting to fetch from LOCAL/ahze.
fetch: LOCAL/ahzedistcc-avahi-080101.patch: Invalid URL scheme
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/distcc-avahi-080101.patch: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)

How-To-Repeat: make -C /usr/ports/devel/distcc WITH_AVAHI=yes patch
